backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Dead Man's Switch backend, wiring together authorization, user approval, blob storage, and data types for digital assets, nominees, legal verification, death verification, and activity logging.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three login/navigation features (admin login visibility, post-login redirects, admin-only navbar links) to their implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend build planning.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Dead Man's Switch React SPA, setting metadata, favicon, viewport, and mounting the app via the `/src/main.tsx` module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that defines all TanStack Router routes, wrapping admin routes with `AdminRouteGuard`, and renders a shared layout with Navbar, Footer, and Toaster.
Route guard component that checks authentication and admin status, rendering appropriate error/loading states or redirecting to login/dashboard if access is not permitted.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar component that renders different links for guests, authenticated users, and admins, and handles Internet Identity login/logout.
frontend/src/components/SecurityBadge.ts: Reusable badge component that renders styled status/security labels (e.g., AES-256, verified, pending) with icons based on a badge type prop.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing it when the user's identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, assets, nominees, admin checks, and death verification requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS base layers, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for dark/light themes, and input visibility overrides for consistent dark-mode form styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AccessReleaseSuccessP: Displays a success confirmation page after digital assets have been released to nominees, showing a release summary with timestamp, action, authorization status, and blockchain audit trail badges.
frontend/src/pages/AddAssetPage.tsx: Provides a form for users to add encrypted digital asset credentials (platform, username, password, category) to the blockchain and lists existing assets with the option to remove them.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin-only dashboard that displays navigation cards for document review, death verification, legal verification, and controlled access release, with pending-item badges fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeathVerificatio: Admin page for reviewing heir death verification requests, allowing admins to approve or reject each request via confirmation dialogs and displaying request status in a table.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDocumentReviewPa: Admin page that lists all submitted user documents (ID proofs, death certificates, relationship proofs) and lets admins open a detail dialog to approve or reject each document with an optional note.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLegalVerificatio: Admin page for looking up and managing legal verification status of users by principal ID. Allows admins to approve or reject pending legal verifications with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ControlledAccessRelea: Admin-only page implementing a multi-step authentication flow (credentials → OTP → confirm) to authorize controlled access release for a target user. Records the release action via a mutation and displays activity logs.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main user dashboard displaying summary stats for assets, nominees, legal verification status, and recent activity logs. Provides navigation cards to key sections of the app.
frontend/src/pages/DeathVerificationRequ: Multi-step form page allowing heirs to submit a death verification request by providing deceased/heir details, uploading documents, and verifying via a generated OTP. On success, displays a confirmation with a request ID.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public marketing landing page showcasing the Dead Man's Switch product with a hero section, feature highlights, and a step-by-step how-it-works guide. Provides CTAs to log in or submit a death verification request.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page supporting 'user' and 'admin' modes via Internet Identity authentication, with an OTP verification step and post-login redirection to admin dashboard, user dashboard, or registration based on role and profile status.
frontend/src/pages/NomineeManagementPage: Page for managing nominees, allowing users to add (with name, relationship, and optional ID proof file) and remove nominees, displaying each nominee's verification status with badges and icons.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: Multi-step registration page (profile → nominees → complete) that collects a user's name and optional file, saves their profile, and optionally adds nominees before completing registration.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, accent, gold, success, warning, sidebar, chart, etc.), custom fonts, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking three existing features: visible admin login on the login page, correct post-login redirects by role, and admin-only navbar links visibility.
